mapper.select: SELECT itinerary_version FROM trip.trips WHERE id = #{tripId} AND status != 'DELETED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO itinerary.itinerary_days ( id, trip_id, group_type, day_number, date, title, sort_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{day.id}, #{day.tripId}, #{day.groupType}, #{day.dayNumber}, #{day.date}, #{day.title}, #{day.sortOrder}, #{day.createdAt}, #{day.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, trip_id, group_type, day_number, date, title, sort_order FROM itinerary.itinerary_days WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND id = #{dayId}
SELECT id, trip_id, group_type, day_number, date, title, sort_order FROM itinerary.itinerary_days WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND group_type = 'UNSCHEDULED' LIMIT 1

UPDATE itinerary.itinerary_days SET day_number = #{update.dayNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, date = #{update.date,jdbcType=DATE}, title = #{update.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_order = #{update.sortOrder}, updated_at = #{update.updatedAt} WHERE trip_id = #{update.tripId} AND id = #{update.dayId} RETURNING id, trip_id, group_type, day_number, date, title, sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO itinerary.itinerary_items ( id, trip_id, itinerary_day_id, sort_order, item_type, place_provider, external_place_id, place_name, address, lat, lng, thumbnail_url, source_status, created_by_user_id, updated_by_user_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{item.id}, #{item.tripId}, #{item.itineraryDayId}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.itemType}, #{item.placeProvider}, #{item.externalPlaceId}, #{item.placeName}, #{item.address}, #{item.lat}, #{item.lng}, #{item.thumbnailUrl}, #{item.sourceStatus}, #{item.createdByUserId}, #{item.updatedByUserId}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, itinerary_day_id, sort_order, item_type, place_provider, external_place_id, place_name, address, lat, lng, thumbnail_url, source_status FROM itinerary.itinerary_items WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND id = #{itemId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE itinerary.itinerary_items SET itinerary_day_id = #{update.itineraryDayId}, sort_order = #{update.sortOrder}, place_name = #{update.placeName}, address = #{update.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lat = #{update.lat,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, lng = #{update.lng,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, thumbnail_url = #{update.thumbnailUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_by_user_id = #{update.updatedByUserId}, updated_at = #{update.updatedAt} WHERE trip_id = #{update.tripId} AND id = #{update.itemId} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id, itinerary_day_id, sort_order, item_type, place_provider, external_place_id, place_name, address, lat, lng, thumbnail_url, source_status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO itinerary.map_drawings ( id, trip_id, itinerary_day_id, drawing_type, geometry_format, geometry, style, label, sort_order, version, created_by_user_id, updated_by_user_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{drawing.id}, #{drawing.tripId}, #{drawing.itineraryDayId}, #{drawing.drawingType}, #{drawing.geometryFormat}, #{drawing.geometry}::jsonb, #{drawing.style}::jsonb, #{drawing.label}, #{drawing.sortOrder}, #{drawing.version}, #{drawing.createdByUserId}, #{drawing.updatedByUserId}, #{drawing.createdAt}, #{drawing.updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO itinerary.trip_routes ( id, trip_id, origin_itinerary_item_id, destination_itinerary_item_id, mode, provider, provider_profile, geometry_format, geometry, distance_meters, duration_seconds, confidence, created_by_user_id, updated_by_user_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{route.id}, #{route.tripId}, #{route.originItineraryItemId}, #{route.destinationItineraryItemId}, #{route.mode}, #{route.provider}, #{route.providerProfile}, #{route.geometryFormat}, #{route.geometry}::jsonb, #{route.distanceMeters}, #{route.durationSeconds}, #{route.confidence}, #{route.createdByUserId}, #{route.updatedByUserId}, #{route.createdAt}, #{route.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: UPDATE itinerary.trip_routes SET mode = COALESCE(#{update.mode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mode), provider_profile = COALESCE(#{update.providerProfile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, provider_profile), geometry = COALESCE(#{update.geometry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, geometry), distance_meters = COALESCE(#{update.distanceMeters,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, distance_meters), duration_seconds = COALESCE(#{update.durationSeconds,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, duration_seconds), confidence = COALESCE(#{update.confidence,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, confidence), updated_by_user_id = #{update.updatedByUserId}, updated_at = #{update.updatedAt} WHERE trip_id = #{update.tripId} AND id = #{update.routeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id, origin_itinerary_item_id, destination_itinerary_item_id, mode, provider, provider_profile, geometry_format, geometry::text AS geometry, distance_meters, duration_seconds, confidence

INSERT INTO itinerary.route_match_requests ( trip_id, trip_route_id, origin_itinerary_item_id, destination_itinerary_item_id, requested_by_user_id, provider, provider_profile, input_coordinates, radiuses, tidy, request_hash, status, confidence, distance_meters, duration_seconds, tracepoints, matchings_metadata, error_code, error_message, created_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{request.tripId}, #{request.tripRouteId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{request.originItineraryItemId}, #{request.destinationItineraryItemId}, #{request.requestedByUserId}, #{request.provider}, #{request.providerProfile}, #{request.inputCoordinates}::jsonb, #{request.radiuses,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{request.tidy}, #{request.requestHash}, #{request.status}, #{request.confidence,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{request.distanceMeters,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{request.durationSeconds,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{request.tracepoints,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{request.matchingsMetadata,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{request.errorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{request.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{request.createdAt}, #{request.completedAt} ) RETURNING id
SELECT count(*) FROM itinerary.itinerary_items WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
